_publications._publicationTitle: Effects of Neurod1 Expression on Mouse and Human Schwannoma Cells.

_contextSnippet: Vestibular thresholds were within the normal range for all groups (−4.5 to −13.5 dB re:1g/ms...There were no differences in mean threshold across genotypes
details: Vestibular thresholds were within normal range for all groups (-4.5 to -13.5 dB re:1g/ms) with no differences in mean threshold across genotypes
